name: Vintage Swing Golf Club
address: 350 E Kettleman Ln Suite 3, Lodi, CA 95240
about: Vintage Swing Golf Club is a private indoor golf studio featuring Trackman-powered simulator bays. You hit real golf balls with your own clubs and see precise ball flight, distances, and shot data just like outdoors, without weather or crowds. Membership is the primary way to access the club, though hourly simulator bookings will be available during select times. The venue is designed for golfers of all skill levels in a clean, relaxed setting.
why_golfers_like_it: No weather or crowds to interrupt practice and play
Trackman iO provides highly accurate ball and club data
Available for memberships and hourly bookings for flexibility
Private indoor environment with a clean and relaxed setting

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service provided.
No information on alcohol service provided.

simulator_hardware.notes: Highly accurate radar-based launch monitor provides ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need to be a member to play at Vintage Swing Golf Club?
faq.answer: Membership is the primary way to access the club, but hourly simulator bookings will be available during select times.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information on outside food and drink policy is provided.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No information on typical 18-hole playing times is provided.

faq.question: Is Vintage Swing Golf Club beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Indoor simulator golf is ideal for beginners — there’s no pressure, no pace-of-play concerns, and no weather. Players of all skill levels are welcome.
